about.title: About me
text: I'm Saqib Waheed, a passionate React Native Developer with 1.5+ year of hands-on experience in building and maintaining cross-platform mobile applications. I specialize in crafting scalable, high-performance apps with clean and maintainable code. With a strong foundation in React.js, React Native, JavaScript, and UI/UX design, I aim to deliver seamless user experiences and innovative solutions. During my career journey, I’ve had the privilege to:
Intern as a React Native Developer at X Apparel Private Limited from January to April 2024. Continue as a Junior React Native Developer at the same company from April to Present.

In these roles, I’ve honed my skills in creating seamless mobile experiences integrating cutting-edge technologies like TensorFlow.js WebView  and Firebase, and solving challenging problems to deliver high-performing apps.

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.description: React Native, Cross-platform solutions, API Integration.

services.title: Front-end Development
services.description: React.js, HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS.

services.title: Performance Optimization & Debugging
services.description: Ensuring smooth and efficient app functionality.

services.title: Wordpress Developer
services.description: Custom Themes, Plugin Integration, WooCommerce Setup.

testimonials.name: Bilal Maqsood, X Apparel Pvt Ltd. Manager
testimonials.text: Saqib transformed our app with a sleek, user-friendly design and optimized performance. His problem-solving skills and attention to detail were outstanding!.

testimonials.name: Muhammad Hamza, X Apparel Pvt Ltd. CEO
testimonials.text: Professional, efficient, and always ready to tackle challenges. Saqib played a crucial role in improving our e-commerce app's functionality.

testimonials.name: Umer Toor, GitLogix Manager
testimonials.text: Working with Saqib was a great experience. He built a high-performing mobile application that met all our expectations and beyond!.

education.title: National University of Modern Languages,Islamabad
education.description: Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering

experience.title: React Native Developer
experience.description: Developed and maintained cross-platform mobile applications using React Native.

experience.title: React Native Internship
experience.description: During my internship, I gained a solid understanding of React Native's basic concepts, including component-based development, state management, navigation, and API integration. I worked on building and optimizing mobile applications, enhancing my skills in cross-platform development.

experience.title: Front End Developer Internship
experience.description: During my internship, I learned the fundamentals of React for front-end development, including component-based architecture, state and props management, React Router for navigation, and API integration. I worked on building dynamic and responsive user interfaces, improving my skills in modern web development.
